Athens Times

The marginally lost qualification to the final 8th of the aconism to them and stayed in the 9th place of her race. Despite her good first shot at 61.85 metres, Elina Gengo did not have a corresponding sequel and with two low efforts thereafter, she failed to find herself in claiming medals in the 2024 Olympic Games women’s sharpening. The Greek champion had made a new record this year for herself in the qualifiers, with a shot at 63.22 meters, but in the final she did not find a corresponding effort, thus staying in 9th place. So he marginally missed the opportunity for three more shots in the final, which the athletes get with the best 8 performances. LIVE from Gengo’s “battle” in the final of aconism at the 2024 Olympics The Greek champion finishes her match here, after her first shot at 61.85 meters left her marginally out of 8a and 9th place of the final of aconism, which will continue with the athletes who had the 8 best performance. Ogrodnikova from the Czech Republic throws the javelin at 63.68 metres and leaves Gengo out of follow-up to the final. Low and Gengo’s third attempt. At 57.90 meters her shot. Gengo’s down to 8 now. Bad second attempt by Gengo, under 55 meters. The Greek champion is calling her off. Kitagucci passed first class with a shot at 65.80 meters. Gengo is fifth after the first attempts have been completed. In third place with this shot Gengo and while there are four athletes left for their first attempt. Excellent first shot for Gengo at 61.85 meters. Great shot by Japanese Kitagucci at 65.80 meters. The final of aconism began, with Andreitsik throwing her javelin at 62.44 metres. Gengo will shoot 8th in a row, her first shot. The presentation of the athletes in acupuncture began. Elina Gengo enters the final of aconism, with the 5th best performance in the qualifiers. In a few minutes the women’s sharpening final will begin at the 2024 Olympics.
